name: Fellwar Stone
oracle_text: {T}: Add one mana of any color that a land an opponent controls could produce.

name: Library of Leng
oracle_text:
You have no maximum hand size.
If an effect causes you to discard a card, discard it, but you may put it on top of your library instead of into your graveyard.

name: Scroll Rack
oracle_text: {1}, {T}: Exile any number of cards from your hand face down. Put that many cards from the top of your library into your hand. Then look at the exiled cards and put them on top of your library in any order.

name: Talisman of Conviction
oracle_text:
{T}: Add {C}.
{T}: Add {R} or {W}. This artifact deals 1 damage to you.

name: Unexpected Windfall
oracle_text:
As an additional cost to cast this spell, discard a card.
Draw two cards and create two Treasure tokens. (They're artifacts with "{T}, Sacrifice this token: Add one mana of any color.")
